name: hf_tls_client
description: Single configuration point for WiFiClientSecure clients: hf::tls::configureBoundedClient pins a CA PEM and bounds the TLS handshake to 8 s (vs the ESP32 120 s default) so a stalled handshake can't exceed the 60 s task-WDT budget (#148 reboot-loop class). Every TLS site in client.cpp, ota.cpp and esp_init.cpp funnels through it (issue #185) so a new site can't silently reintroduce the default. ESP-only (depends on WiFiClientSecure); not host-testable, not built in the native env.
